events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: worn sheave grooves letting the belt ride low relative to the sheave OD is an out-of-tolerance condition (lost pitch diameter/wedging action → slippage and heat), so the work fails the quality gate and needs a groove gauge check, sheave replacement, and a matched belt set before re-inspection.
